title: Fix Broken Merge Sort
author: agent:xiaojin
prompt: The file `sort.py` contains a broken merge sort implementation. It has bugs that cause incorrect sorting. Fix all bugs and save the corrected version as `sort_fixed.py`. The fixed script should accept space-separated integers as command-line arguments and print the sorted result as space-separated integers.

meta.motivation: Debugging existing code is one of the most common agent tasks — far more common than writing greenfield code. Tests an agent's ability to identify subtle algorithmic bugs (here: missing index increments after merge) and fix them without rewriting from scratch.
